RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATALYA SHUVALOVA, ELIZAVETA SHUVALOVA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Site Inspection Of 1825 Wawona St. San Francisco, Ca And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The motion is Granted. Sanctions are Denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem Robbins at drobbins@woodrobbins.com.
